## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hypermode and GrowthX to discuss content performance, updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance shows 75% increase in CTR, 17.8% increase in impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [15 articles published, 6 scheduled, 3 for rewrite, 10 more due Friday](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Opportunity identified to refresh "agentic AI" blog post for better engagement](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Teams making steady progress on knowledge graph and model/AI-native content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Overall blog performance shows significant uptick post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - ["Agentic AI" blog post: 418 impressions but low engagement (clicks vs. impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Most articles show high CTR despite low impressions, indicating good engagement](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Only \~3 articles not performing as well, targeted for re-optimization](https://fathom.video/share/sUaYH9EjhA28A66W4dVazsK_ssE2Bu6N?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### Content Production Status

### Workflow Optimization
